quality.rationale: 多步相对论运动学推导结合不变质量守恒，具有真实的宇宙射线能谱截断物理背景

origin.question: Problem 2.8. Calculate the threshold energy of a nucleon $\mathbf{N}$ for it to undergo the reaction$$\gamma + \mathbf {N}\rightarrow \mathbf {N} + \pi$$where $\gamma$ represents a photon of temperature $3^0\mathrm{K}$ . Assume the collision is head-on; take the photon energy to be $\sim \mathrm{kT}$ ; $\mathfrak{m}_{\mathbf{N}} = 940\mathrm{MeV}$ ; $\mathfrak{m}_{\pi} = 140\mathrm{MeV}$ . (This effect probably produces a cut-off in the cosmic-ray spectrum at this threshold energy.)
origin.solution: Solution 2.8. Conservation of 4-momentum gives us$$\begin{array}{l} \mathbf {P}_{\gamma} + \mathbf {P}_{\mathbf {N}} = \mathbf {P}_{\mathbf {N}^{\prime}} + \mathbf {P}_{\pi} \quad \left(\mathbf {N}^{\prime} = \text {n u c l e o n c o m i n g o u t o f r e a c t i o n}\right) \\(\mathbf {P}_{\gamma} + \mathbf {P}_{\mathbf {N}})^{2} = (\mathbf {P}_{\mathbf {N}^{\prime}} + \mathbf {P}_{\pi})^{2}. \\\end{array}$$In the lab frame (where $\mathbf{E}_{\gamma} \sim 3^{0}\mathbf{K} \sim 2.5 \times 10^{-10}\mathrm{MeV}$ ),$$\mathbf {P}_{\gamma} = (\mathbf {E}_{\gamma}, \underline {{\mathbf {P}}}_{\gamma}), \quad \mathbf {P}_{\mathbf {N}} = (\mathbf {E}_{\mathbf {N}}, \underline {{\mathbf {P}}}_{\mathbf {N}}) .$$In the C.M. frame at threshold,$$\mathbf {P}_{\mathbf {N}^{\prime}} + \mathbf {P}_{\pi} = \left(\mathrm {m}_{\mathbf {N}} + \mathrm {m}_{\pi}, 0\right)$$so that$$\begin{array}{l} 2 \mathbf {P}_{\gamma} \cdot \mathbf {P}_{\mathrm {N}} - \mathbf {m}_{\mathrm {N}}^{2} = - (\mathbf {m}_{\mathrm {N}} + \mathbf {m}_{\pi})^{2} \\- 2 \mathrm {E}_{\gamma} \mathrm {E}_{\mathrm {N}} + 2 \underset {\sim \gamma} {\mathrm {P}} \cdot \underset {\sim} {\mathrm {P}}_{\mathrm {N}} = - 2 \mathrm {m}_{\mathrm {N}} \mathrm {m}_{\pi} - \mathrm {m}_{\pi}^{2}. \\\end{array}$$Now $\mathbf{P}_{\gamma} = \mathbf{E}_{\gamma}$ since $\mathfrak{m}_{\gamma} = 0$ and, for a head-on collision $\mathbf{\underline{P}}_{\gamma} \cdot \mathbf{\underline{P}}_{\mathbf{N}} = -\mathbf{P}_{\gamma} \mathbf{P}_{\mathbf{N}}$ , so that$$\begin{array}{l} E_{N} + \left(E_{N}^{2} - m_{N}^{2}\right)^{\frac {1}{2}} = \frac {2 m_{N} m_{\pi} + m_{\pi}^{2}}{2 E_{\gamma}} \\= \frac {2 \cdot 9 4 0 \cdot 1 4 0 + 1 4 0^{2}}{2 \cdot (2 . 5 \times 1 0^{- 1 0})} \mathrm {M e V} = 6 \times 1 0^{1 4} \mathrm {M e V}. \\\end{array}$$Since $\mathbf{E}_{\mathbf{N}} >> \mathfrak{m}_{\mathbf{N}}$ , we can replace $(\mathbf{E}_{\mathbf{N}}^{2} - \mathfrak{m}_{\mathbf{N}}^{2})^{\frac{1}{2}}$ by $\mathbf{E}_{\mathbf{N}}$ . Thus $\mathbf{E}_{\mathbf{N}} \approx 3 \times 10^{14} \mathrm{MeV}$ .
